macro.title: Soaring jet fuel prices and shortages could threaten your European vacation - The Washington Post
macro.summary: Even if fuel shortages can be avoided, airfare prices overseas and in the United States are expected to continue to climb as the war in Iran disrupts supplies.

macro.title: Baby food brand HiPP recalls jars in Austria after samples test positive for rat poison - AP News
macro.summary: HiPP is recalling some baby food jars in Austria after samples tested positive for rat poison in Austria, Slovakia and the Czech Republic. Officials believe the tampering occurred in 190-gram jars of carrot and potato baby food for 5-month-olds sold at SPAR s…

macro.title: How dangerous trucking companies escape their past, change names and get back on the road. - CBS News
macro.summary: As truck traffic explodes, the government and industry haven’t been able to stop thousands of so-called “chameleon carriers,” with deadly consequences.

macro.title: Big Tech’s $4 Trillion Boomerang Powers S&P 500 to New Heights - Bloomberg.com
macro.summary: Big Tech stocks are back and powering the S&P 500 Index to new highs, giving investors confidence that the latest equity market rally has room to run even as the risks from the war with Iran remain.
